petrov_stage: Increase flexibility with how / can / still / already style questions.
petrov_mission: Ask how someone is, whether they can do something, and restate the line in another time frame.
focus_targets: 可以 marks possibility or permission
Verb matrix: plain, negated, completed, experiential, and future-intention forms
Context often carries time in Chinese

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 怎么, 不怎么样, 还, 可以.
Listen to a line that uses 怎么 asks how and 可以 marks possibility or permission and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 怎么, 不怎么样, 还, 可以.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses 怎么 asks how with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: Ask how someone is, whether they can do something, and restate the line in another time frame.
Say in Chinese: How are you now?

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 怎么, 不怎么样, 还, 可以, 还可以.
What does 还可以 mean in this lesson?
Translate into Chinese: Have you been to China?
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 怎么, 不怎么样, 还.
Produces one correct spoken line using 怎么 asks how.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
